rules.description: Deep-dive business analysis with data interpretation and trend identification
Strategic planning with frameworks, prioritization, and tradeoff analysis
Financial modeling — revenue, costs, projections, and scenario analysis
Market research: sizing, trends, customer segments, and opportunity assessment
Competitive analysis: positioning, strengths, gaps, and differentiation opportunities
Pitch deck or pitch narrative generation — problem, solution, market, traction, ask
Product or business roadmap with milestones, dependencies, and timelines
KPI dashboard design: define, track, and interpret key metrics
